assumptions: The question concerns consolidated financial statements under IFRS.
The dividend-related balance is denominated in a foreign currency.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting for intragroup monetary items
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 specifically identifies foreign currency risk on an intragroup monetary item as a distinct hedged-item model that can apply in consolidated financial statements when the exchange differences are not fully eliminated on consolidation.

approaches.label: Hedge accounting for highly probable forecast intragroup transactions
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 separately identifies foreign currency risk on a highly probable forecast intragroup transaction as a distinct hedged-item model in consolidated financial statements.
